raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 550 authorizes San Jose State University to create the first public law school in the California State University system.",
    "SB 550 is designed to provide access to law school for working adults and first-generation students.",
    "Cost and geographic barriers prevent first-generation and underrepresented students from entering the legal profession.",
    "California faces a crisis in affordable legal education due to high costs and limited public options.",
    "Santa Clara County currently has no public law school despite having nearly 2 million residents.",
    "Over 65% of Santa Clara County's population identifies as Asian or Latino, groups that are underrepresented among licensed attorneys statewide.",
    "The average law school debt in private schools exceeds $130,000.",
    "67% of young lawyers report financial stress, which deters many from pursuing legal careers.",
    "SB 550 aims to develop an affordable public law school to diversify California's legal pipeline."
  ]
}
```
